headline: Royal Caribbean Group Confirms Order for Icon 6 and 7
summary: Royal Caribbean Group, a global vacation leader redefining the future of vacations, announced it has confirmed with Meyer Turku the order of a sixth and seventh Icon Class ship to be delivered in 2029...

headline: RCL Set to Report Q1 Earnings: Will Strong Demand Continue?
